message:
feat(core,bench,ci): add configurable proptest case counts and expand baseline capture benchmarks

Property tests across trig, mutex, buffer, and conversion modules now
respect FRANKENLIBC_PROPTEST_CASES for CI-tunable iteration counts,
preventing timeout on slower runners while allowing thorough local runs.
The baseline capture benchmark suite is substantially expanded.

- core/math/trig, pthread/mutex, stdio/buffer, stdlib/conversion: add
  property_proptest_config() helper reading FRANKENLIBC_PROPTEST_CASES
  env var with a per-module default; apply to all proptest! blocks
- core/tests/property_tests: minor test adjustment
- bench/baseline_capture_bench: expand benchmark scenarios with
  additional workload profiles and measurement granularity
- ci.yml: add FRANKENLIBC_PROPTEST_CASES to CI environment
- ci.sh: wire new benchmark and property gates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -92,6 +92,10 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           cargo build -p frankenlibc-abi --release 2>&1 | tee artifacts/ci/release-abi.log
 
+      - name: Check replacement guard (interpose policy)
+        run: |
+          bash scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh interpose 2>&1 | tee artifacts/ci/replacement-guard-interpose.log
+
       - name: Build standalone replacement artifact when feature exists
         run: |
           if grep -Eq '(^|[[:space:]])standalone([[:space:]]*=|[[:space:]])' crates/frankenlibc-abi/Cargo.toml; then
@@ -107,7 +111,10 @@ jobs:
           name: release-build-artifacts
           path: |
             artifacts/ci/release-*.log
+            artifacts/ci/replacement-guard-interpose.log
             target/release/libfrankenlibc_abi.so
+            target/conformance/replacement_guard.report.json
+            target/conformance/replacement_guard.log.jsonl
           if-no-files-found: warn
           retention-days: 14

@@ -220,6 +220,11 @@ if [[ "${FRANKENLIBC_EXTENDED_GATES:-0}" == "1" ]]; then
     echo "PASS"
     echo ""
 
+    echo "--- replacement guard (interpose policy) ---"
+    bash scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh interpose
+    echo "PASS"
+    echo ""
+
     echo "--- perf budget gate ---"
     scripts/check_perf_budget.sh
     echo "PASS"
